name: White Blood Cell Count
description: This test case evaluates the ability to query for white blood cell count laboratory values. The phenotype follows PRIMED harmonization instructions for obtaining a single WBC value per individual.
prompt: Find all white blood cell count laboratory measurements for adult patients aged 18 and older from outpatient visits, excluding measurements taken during sepsis episodes.

required_codes.display: Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
